invalidation.zh: 价格跌破3050（基于ATR $50.94调整，原止损3000上移）或资金费率Z-Score回落至100%以下（多头压力缓解）。
invalidation.en: Price breaks below 3050 (adjusted from original 3000 based on ATR $50.94) or funding rate Z-Score drops below 100% (long pressure eases).

invalidation.zh: 资金费率Z-Score回升至-50%以上（空头压力缓解）或价格跌破125（基于ATR和关键支撑）。
invalidation.en: Funding rate Z-Score recovers above -50% (short pressure eases) or price breaks below 125 (based on ATR and key support).
